3168750.name: Use Your Voice
3168750.description:
*GAME REQUIRES MICROPHONE*
"Use Your Voice" is an endless runner where you use voice commands to control your character.

"Use Your Voice" is a randomly generated endless runner. Use your real life microphone to talk to the character in game. Say commands such as "Run, Jump, Crawl" to try make it as far as you can. Each time you lose, you restart back at the beginning. "Use Your Voice" is a brutal yet funny game to play. How long can you go for ?
3168750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
